# Zenvest - Gen Z Investment App

## Project Overview
A modern, beginner-friendly investment app designed for Gen Z users (18-25) with AI guidance, gamification, and mock trading features.

## Core Architecture
- **Frontend**: React 18 + Vite
- **Backend**: Firebase (Firestore, Auth)
- **Charts**: Recharts
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- **State**: Zustand
- **AI**: Claude API integration for investment chatbot

## Key Features
1. Authentication (Firebase)
2. Portfolio Dashboard with real-time updates
3. Stock browsing and search with mock data
4. Buy/Sell interface with instant confirmation
5. Gamified learning system with badges and levels
6. AI-powered investment guide
7. Leaderboard and social features
8. Virtual money practice mode
9. Goal tracking and recommendations
10. Dark mode by default with vibrant Gen Z UI

## Development Guidelines
- Use component-based architecture with reusable UI components
- Implement dark mode first, light mode as secondary
- Add smooth animations and micro-interactions
- Include code comments for clarity
- Follow mobile-first responsive design
- Use mock data for stock prices (API-ready structure)

## Color Palette (Gen Z)
- Primary: #8B5CF6 (vibrant purple)
- Secondary: #EC4899 (hot pink)
- Accent: #06B6D4 (cyan)
- Background: #0f172a (dark navy)
- Cards: #1e293b (slate)
- Text: #f1f5f9 (light slate)

## Project Status
Setup in progress - scaffolding React project with Firebase integration.
